title: mitrasacme setosa
intro: Mitrasacme setosa is a flowering plant species, also known as the woolly threadplant, native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Mitrasacme setosa include the relief of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water, with the resulting tea believed to provide relief from various health conditions.
